helm_definition.name: Hoch Ecosystem Logic Matrix
helm_definition.tagline: Orchestrating Intelligence · Securing Reality · Advancing Humanity

principles.name: Truth First
principles.hover_summary: No fake green — unknown renders UNKNOWN, never GO. Doctrine in every payload.

principles.name: Evidence Based
principles.hover_summary: Every lane 'done' maps to a real artifact + timestamp (evidence_map).

principles.name: Auditable
principles.hover_summary: Signed gates, UTC-stamped ledgers, POA&M. founder_handoff_queue + RELEASE_APPROVAL.

principles.name: Transparent
principles.hover_summary: Live control plane + posture, hover evidence, cited sources.

principles.name: Secure by Design
principles.hover_summary: DOORSTEP gates, code-task gate, private-only relay, supply-chain-pinned tools.

principles.name: Human Centered
principles.hover_summary: Founder gates: spend, keys, sign, submit, move money. You stay in control.

principles.name: Continuously Improving
principles.hover_summary: ConMon (SP 800-137) + burn-in; promote only on a real eval win.

factories.name: Hoch Application Software Factory
factories.hover_summary: Epic Fury shipped (Apple) + Story Studio engine. Build L2; develop gate-ready.
next_actions: close develop lane behind code-task gate

next_actions: close develop lane behind code-task gate

factories.hover_summary: Relay (Linode + Tailscale) LIVE; infra-as-truth. Build L2; research+design real.

cybersecurity_ato_package.title: Cybersecurity NIST Rev 5 Full ATO Package for HELM

controls_frameworks.name: NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5
controls_frameworks.hover_summary: SI IMPLEMENTED (gitleaks 0 · trivy 0 · signed gate). Other families mapped/partial/planned — see HELM_ATO_PACKAGE.md.

controls_frameworks.name: NIST SP 800-37 Rev 2
controls_frameworks.hover_summary: Package authored: 7 steps mapped; Authorize = AO/founder gate; Monitor = ConMon wired.

controls_frameworks.name: NIST SP 800-137
controls_frameworks.hover_summary: WIRED: hcf_posture.py → security_posture.json; truth source = signed gate R3_NO_OPEN_HIGH.

controls_frameworks.name: NIST SP 800-161 Rev 1
controls_frameworks.hover_summary: PARTIAL: trivy dependency scan + ghcr-pinned images (supply-chain incident avoided). Formal C-SCRM planned.

controls_frameworks.name: NIST SP 800-53A Rev 5
controls_frameworks.hover_summary: PARTIAL: self-assessment via scans + posture; formal assessment plan (SAP) in progress.

controls_frameworks.name: NIST SP 800-53B Rev 5
controls_frameworks.hover_summary: Low baseline selected (FIPS 199 LOW–MOD proposed). Tailoring in progress.

controls_frameworks.name: NIST SP 800-171 Rev 3
controls_frameworks.hover_summary: MAPPED / planned. Applies only if CUI is handled — not currently in scope for HELM.

controls_frameworks.name: NIST SP 800-39
controls_frameworks.hover_summary: MAPPED: org-level risk framing via HELM governance + POA&M. Formal risk strategy doc planned.

controls_frameworks.name: NIST SP 800-160 v1r1
controls_frameworks.hover_summary: PLANNED: secure-by-design principles applied ad hoc (DOORSTEP gates); formal SSE mapping planned.

controls_frameworks.name: NIST CSF 2.0
controls_frameworks.hover_summary: PARTIAL: Identify/Protect/Detect via scans + posture; Respond/Recover (IR/CP) planned.

controls_frameworks.name: CMMC 2.0
controls_frameworks.hover_summary: PLANNED: aligns with 800-171 scope; only relevant for DoD contracts — not current scope.
